main.tagline: Japan onboarding for global products and Japanese commercial vehicles for global buyers.

main.title: Restore rightful value.
main.copy: "We become the storyteller of the world's hidden value. A-one road lives this out through two businesses: bringing the world's best technology into Japan, and automotive (vehicle export, parts, and events).", commercial vehicle export from Japan, and automotive culture events.

main.title: We become the storyteller of the world's hidden value.
main.copy: We re-edit undervalued assets — software, vehicles, and automotive culture — and deliver them to markets where they are rightly valued.

main.title: What we do
main.copy: Two businesses born from one mission.

2.title: Mobility

main.title: Why this company exists.
main.copy: We re-edit overlooked value and deliver it to markets where it is properly appreciated — from software to vehicles to automotive culture.

main.title: Start the conversation.
main.copy: "From bringing global software products to Japan, to sourcing and exporting Japanese commercial vehicles — tell us what you need.", business sourcing discussions, and document requests.

main.title: Unearth hidden values.
main.copy: The world's technology and Japan's field - we deliver overlooked value to markets where it is rightly valued., posture, and business definition.

main.title: We become the storyteller of the world's hidden value.
main.copy: Excellent yet unknown. Valuable yet undelivered. Closing that gap is our work.

1.title: Mission
1.copy: Reduce structures that bury value and increase transactions where value reaches the right buyer.

2.title: Vision
2.copy: Keep connecting Japanese vehicles and field knowledge with real demand worldwide.

3.title: Definition
3.copy: "A company that re-edits the world's technology and Japan's value, connecting each to markets where it is rightly valued."

main.title: "Two businesses, one purpose."
main.copy: "We run two businesses. One is a global GTM partner that selects and adopts the world's leading products for Japanese companies' challenges. The other is mobility - conveying the value of Japanese vehicles, and handling sourcing and export. Different domains, same work: finding hidden value and delivering it right."

1.title: Global GTM Partner
1.copy: "Select, connect and adopt the world's leading products for Japanese companies' challenges."

2.title: Mobility
2.copy: "Convey the value of Japanese vehicles, and handle sourcing and export."

7.label: Address
7.value: Wizard Building 402, 1-4-3 Sengencho, Nishi-ku, Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan

main.title: Mobility
main.copy: "From Japanese kei trucks, kei vans and light commercial vehicles to specialty vehicles, we source and export a wide range — with support across selection, parts, vehicle information and export operations."

1.title: "Automotive PR, Marketing & Events"
1.what: "We plan and run automotive PR, marketing and events end to end."
1.value: We convey a vehicle's value through both product and culture.
1.flow: From concept and outreach to on-site operation.

2.title: Vehicle Sourcing
2.what: "We source and export Japanese commercial, light and specialty vehicles for individuals and businesses."
2.value: "We support selection by use and market, and export procedures."
2.flow: From requirements to candidates to export.

1.question: What vehicles do you handle
1.answer: We mainly source kei trucks, vans, and compact commercial vehicles.

2.question: Can businesses request multiple vehicles
2.answer: "We handle kei trucks, kei vans and light commercial vehicles, as well as specialty and other commercial vehicles.", bulk sourcing is supported.

3.question: Which markets do you support
3.answer: United States, Europe, and other regions.

4.question: Can vehicle condition be confirmed
4.answer: Available information is organized and shared.

5.question: Can I contact you before deciding

main.title: For partnerships press and general inquiries

2.label: Reply
2.value: We usually reply within two business days.

main.title: "The world's best technology, matched to your challenge."
main.copy: "Tell us your business or IT challenge. We select the right product from anywhere in the world, configure it, and see it through to adoption.", position, and sell in the Japanese market. Bilingual Japanese-English operation, based in Yokohama.

main.title: "Start from the challenge, find the right move.", not a directory.
main.copy: "We bridge language, trust, and how decisions get made — in Japanese and in English.", trust, and enterprise decision processes. We work as your hands-on partner on the ground: we speak with your prospects in Japanese, report back in English, and turn interest into a concrete PoC pipeline.
main.lead: "Starting from the business or IT challenge you want solved, we propose the optimal product and configuration from the world's options."

main.title: What we provide
main.copy: From framing the challenge to lasting adoption.

1.title: Discovery
1.copy: We frame your business and IT challenge and define what to solve., regulatory context, and honest feedback from target users.

2.title: Product selection
2.copy: We choose the best-fitting product from candidates worldwide., in natural Japanese.

4.title: Design & PoC
4.copy: We combine products into a form that proves the outcome., one-pagers, and demo scripts that match local business conventions.

5.title: Rollout & adoption
5.copy: From contract and rollout to lasting day-to-day use.

7.title: Ongoing support
7.copy: We keep improving and extending after go-live., with clear success criteria.

main.title: Start small.
main.copy: "We validate a fitting product within a fixed window. If it lands, we move to full rollout.", fixed-scope engagement that tests Japan through real conversations — not a report written from a desk.

3.label: How it runs
3.value: We agree on activities and deliverables before we start.

1.title: Challenge & requirements
1.copy: We put the challenge and the conditions to meet into writing., pricing, and market fit.

2.title: Recommended product
2.copy: "We show the fitting product and how to combine it, concretely."

3.title: Validation plan (PoC)
3.copy: We design the next proof step to confirm the outcome.

1.title: Scope of commitment
1.copy: We commit to the agreed activities and deliverables., not to sales outcomes.

2.title: What we ask of you
2.copy: "Share your current challenge and environment, and join the validation.", product documentation, and technical support during the pilot.

3.title: What we handle
3.copy: "Selection, configuration, rollout and adoption — end to end.", meetings, and interviews in Japanese, reporting in English.
